info.title: Solana API
info.description: API for generating Solana swap instructions across aggregated DEX liquidity.

get.description: Returns the list of enabled sources for the calling team.

parameters.name: 0x-api-key
parameters.description: Visit dashboard.0x.org to get your API Key

post.description: Returns Solana swap instructions for a given token pair and amount.

parameters.name: 0x-api-key
parameters.description: Visit dashboard.0x.org to get your API Key

pubkey.description: Account public key as a 32-byte array.

sources.description: List of enabled sources, as DEX labels.

SwapInstructionsRequest.description: Request body for the swap-instructions endpoint.

amount_in.description: Input amount in its base units.

disabled_sources.description: DEX sources to exclude from routing. Valid source names are returned by `/enabled-sources`.

recipient.description:
Base-58 encoded recipient for swap output.
If output token is native SOL this must be the address of the recipient, else a valid token account for that output token mint.

reserve_transaction_bytes.description: Minimum bytes to reserve in the transaction for composing with additional instructions.

swap_fee_ppm.description:
Comma-separated volume-based swap fees in parts per million.
Must be provided together with `swap_fee_recipient`.
Each entry must be between `0` and the per-app maximum (`100_000` unless configured otherwise).
A value of `0` disables that fee entry.
Multiple fees on the same side are applied sequentially, each on the amount remaining after prior deductions — not the original amount. Fee amounts are rounded up to the nearest base unit.

swap_fee_recipient.description:
Comma-separated base-58 encoded recipients for the swap fees.
Must be provided together with `swap_fee_ppm`.
The number of entries must match `swap_fee_ppm`.
If the respective token for `swap_fee_side` is native SOL this must be an address, else a valid token account for that token mint.

swap_fee_side.description:
Comma-separated fee sides for each fee entry.
Supported values are `buy` and `sell`.
This field may be omitted only when every fee uses the default buy side.
When provided, the number of entries must match `swap_fee_ppm`.

token_in.description: Input token mint, base-58 encoded. Use `So11111111111111111111111111111111111111111` for native SOL.

token_out.description: Output token mint, base-58 encoded. Use `So11111111111111111111111111111111111111111` for native SOL.

trade_surplus_cap_ppm.description:
Trade surplus cap in parts per million of the total realized trade size.
Must be provided together with `trade_surplus_recipient`, or both fields must be omitted.
A value of `0` disables trade surplus collection for the request.
When 0x controls trade surplus collection, the request value is ignored and the configured 0x policy is applied instead.
The transferred amount is capped relative to trade size.

trade_surplus_recipient.description:
Base-58 encoded recipient that should receive trade surplus.
Must be provided together with `trade_surplus_cap_ppm`, or both fields must be omitted.
If the output token is native SOL this must be an address, else a valid token account for that token mint.
When 0x controls trade surplus collection, the request value is ignored and the configured 0x recipient is used instead.

address_lookup_tables.description: Address Lookup Table addresses that must be included in the versioned transaction.

amount_out.description: The estimated amount of the output token received from the swap, in its base units.

instructions.description: The instructions to perform the swap.

route_plan.description: List of swap legs comprising the swap.

zid.description: Unique 12-byte hex identifier for this request.

amount_in.description: The amount of the input token to swap, in its base units.

amount_out.description: The estimated amount of the output token received from the swap, in its base units.

dex_address.description: The Base58-encoded address of the DEX.

dex_label.description: The label for the DEX. Matches labels returned by the `enabled-sources` endpoint.

dex_program_id.description: The Base58-encoded program ID address of the DEX.

ppb.description: Proportion of _remaining_ amount routed through this step in parts per billion.

token_in.description: The Base58-encoded address of the input mint.

token_out.description: The Base58-encoded address of the output mint.
